channel.title: 链聘 ChainHire · 最新 Web3 岗位
channel.description: Web3 / crypto 行业全职能最新公开招聘，每日自动更新。

item.title: Application Security Engineer · Uniswap Labs
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 资深/Staff · New York City, NY (remote option) · $203,000–$225,000。Application security testing for DeFi protocol; web3-native security mindset; NYC HQ with remote option.

item.title: Backend Engineer – Unichain · Uniswap Labs
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 资深/Staff · New York City, NY (remote option) · $210,000–$232,000。5+ years backend engineering; Rust; build/operate distributed blockchain infrastructure for Unichain.

item.title: Community Manager – LATAM · Uniswap Labs
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 中级 · Remote (Latin America) · 面议。Bilingual Spanish/English; grow Uniswap community in LATAM; organic community growth and product feedback.

item.title: Web3 Security Engineer (Wallet Security) · OKX
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote / Singapore · 面议。Deep understanding of blockchain, smart contracts, cryptography; on-chain fraud detection; distributed systems; wallet security audit.

item.title: Security Researcher – Web3 / Cybersecurity · Hyphen Connect
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote / Hong Kong · 面议。Smart contract security audit expertise; greenfield project; excellent knowledge of on-chain security vulnerabilities.

item.title: Senior Database Platform Engineer · Kraken
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Database platform infrastructure for a top-10 crypto exchange; senior-level ops/SRE experience with large-scale databases.

item.title: AI/ML Engineer I · Kraken
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。AI/ML engineering for core APIs; fraud prevention, transaction analysis, user experience systems at Kraken.

item.title: Regional Sales Specialist – Portuguese · Bybit
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote (Latin America / Portugal) · 面议。Portuguese-speaking sales specialist; grow Bybit user base in LATAM/Portugal; crypto exchange products.

item.title: Head of Operations – Web3 · Serotonin
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 负责人/总监 · Remote · 面议。Lead operational excellence across product delivery, partner onboarding, regulatory compliance, finance; AI+crypto focus.

item.title: Smart Contract Engineer – Ethereum / Solidity · Clearmatics
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote / London, UK · 面议。Transform research models into production-grade Solidity smart contracts; Ethereum protocol expertise; London-based team.

item.title: Product Designer (Web3) – Shenzhen · Hyphen Connect
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Shenzhen, China (on-site) · 面议。End-to-end visual design for Web3 financial products; fintech/crypto design experience; Shenzhen on-site.

item.title: UXUI Designer (Tech / Web3) · Hyphen Connect
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote / Asia · 面议。3+ years UX/UI design in Web3 industry; strong portfolio; mobile + web product design.

item.title: Application Security Engineer (Web3) · IFT
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。In-depth manual/automated source code security review; Rust, Nim, C++; smart contract auditing; Status/Logos ecosystem.

item.title: Backend Engineer – CryptoEconLab · Protocol Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。High-performance distributed systems; Rust/Go/Python; Web3; crypto-economic research and protocol engineering.

item.title: Senior Backend Engineer (Golang / Ruby on Rails) – KYC & Onboarding · Crypto.com
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote / Asia · 面议。Golang/Ruby on Rails; build and maintain User Onboarding and KYC systems for a global crypto exchange.

item.title: Senior Software Engineer – Rust (ZK / Privacy) · Provable
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Exceptional Rust engineering; build privacy-preserving zero-knowledge protocols and products.

item.title: Associate Product Manager · BitGo
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Toronto, Ontario, Canada · 面议。1–3 years PM experience; institutional custody and wallet infrastructure; Toronto office.

item.title: Senior Product Manager – Institutional Custody · BitGo
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · San Francisco, CA · 面议。5+ years PM; lead product roadmap for institutional-grade custody and wallet infrastructure.

item.title: Frontend Engineer – Growth · BitGo
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · New York City, NY · 面议。React frontend engineering; build UI components for growth features at institutional crypto custody provider.

item.title: Marketing Specialist – Community & Social Growth (Web3 / Crypto) · Hyphen Connect
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote / Asia · 面议。Community and social media growth marketing for Web3/crypto products; strategy and execution across channels.

item.title: Web3 Head of Marketing and Communications (Nigeria-Remote) · Token Metrics
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 负责人/总监 · Remote (Nigeria / Africa timezone) · 面议。Exceptional community building; video and social media content expertise for crypto audiences; marketing leadership.

item.title: Web3 Growth Manager · OKX
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote / Singapore · 面议。In-depth Web3/blockchain/crypto knowledge; bilingual Chinese/English; drive Web3 product growth strategy.

item.title: AML Compliance Officer (Crypto Project) · Unlimit
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote / Limassol, Cyprus · 面议。Design and implement AML/CTF Compliance Program for cryptocurrency business; EU-licensed fintech context.

item.title: Compliance Analyst – FCM (Futures Commission Merchant) · Crypto.com
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote / United States · 面议。AML/KYC, CFTC regulations, FCM compliance; sales solicitation reviews; crypto exchange compliance.

item.title: Protocol Engineer · Movement Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · San Francisco, CA (remote option) · 面议。Full-stack blockchain expertise (networking, consensus, cryptography); Move/MoveVM-based L1/L2 protocol engineering.

item.title: Senior Software Engineer – Babylon Core (Europe / APAC) · Babylon Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote (Europe or APAC) · 面议。Core Bitcoin staking protocol engineering; distributed systems; Babylon PoS infrastructure; Europe or APAC timezone.

item.title: Developer Relations Engineer · Babylon Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Technical developer relations for Babylon Bitcoin staking ecosystem; documentation, advocacy, and community support.

item.title: Developer Relations Engineer – APAC · Movement Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote (APAC) · 面议。Developer relations for APAC Web3 ecosystem; Move blockchain advocacy; technical enablement for APAC developers.

item.title: Senior Backend Engineer · Babylon Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Backend engineering for Bitcoin staking protocol; Golang/Rust; distributed systems; Babylon PoS network.

item.title: Research Engineer · Movement Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · San Francisco, CA · 面议。Research engineering on Move/MoveVM blockchain; systems and protocol research; San Francisco-based.

item.title: Senior DevOps Engineer · Babylon Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Full lifecycle DevOps for Babylon PoS networks; Kubernetes, Cosmos/blockchain infrastructure; SRE-level reliability.

item.title: Senior Software Engineer – Integrations · Babylon Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Cosmos ecosystem integrations; critical role bringing Babylon to Cosmos; distributed systems engineering.

item.title: Senior Engineering Manager · Movement Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 负责人/总监 · San Francisco, CA · 面议。Engineering leadership for Movement blockchain infrastructure; team management; San Francisco on-site.

item.title: Head of Sales · 0x
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 负责人/总监 · Remote · 面议。Turn DEX infrastructure into predictable growth; enterprise sales for 0x API; Web3 ecosystem partnerships.

item.title: Head of Finance · Offchain Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 负责人/总监 · Remote / New York, NY · 面议。Finance leadership for Arbitrum/Offchain Labs; digital assets treasury management; Web3/Fintech CFO-level experience.

item.title: Design Director – MetaMask (Transactions) · Consensys
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 负责人/总监 · Remote · 面议。Design leadership for MetaMask transactions UX; own end-to-end design for crypto wallet transaction flows.

item.title: Sales Director – Crypto Native (APAC / HK) · Fireblocks
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 负责人/总监 · Hong Kong / Greater China · 面议。Crypto-native sales director; target financial institutions and tech partners in HK and Greater China; APAC expansion.

item.title: Senior Software Engineer – Payments · Blockchain.com
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 资深/Staff · Remote / London, UK · 面议。Senior software engineering for blockchain payments platform; distributed systems; London/remote.

item.title: iOS Engineer (Web3) · Trust Wallet
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 中级 · Remote · 面议。iOS 开发（Swift/Objective-C）3 年以上，熟悉 Web3 钱包集成、区块链 SDK，有加密货币 App 经验优先。

item.title: Frontend Engineer · Trust Wallet
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 中级 · Remote · 面议。前端工程师，3 年以上 React/TypeScript 经验，熟悉 ethers.js/Web3.js，有 DeFi 或 NFT 产品经验优先。
